_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Programming and build (data analytics and engineering) involves working with code across the software development life cycle, following modern development standards and practices, test automation, build pipelines and repeatable deployment processes, to implement secure, maintainable software solutions.
reference_document_element_description: Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope definition, workstream structure, milestone schedule, resource plan, and risk register.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-005 (DA, cosine: 0.473), AI-S-005 (AI, cosine: 0.469).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.0/10 (raw 0.499). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DDaT-only terms [across, analytics, automation, build, code, cycle] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain, milestone] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.853 (P=0.844, R=0.863). Balanced P/R — the 37-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Programming and build (data analytics and engineering) involves working with cod" and "Develop and maintain program plans for data and AI initiatives, including scope". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.586 > STS 0.499 (gap +0.087). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.1%. Shared tokens: [data]. DDaT-only: [across, analytics, automation, build, code, cycle]. WIDAI-only: [ai, definition, develop, initiatives, maintain, milestone].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.8% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
